scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @workspace/web run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.load-test:report: artillery run tests/load/load-test.yml --output tests/load/reports/load-test-report.json && artillery report tests/load/reports/load-test-report.json
